description: bw profiles subcommand auto-discovers all browser profiles on the local system
steps: bw profiles exits 0 (even if no browsers installed — returns empty list gracefully)
bw profiles --format text prints lines in format: '{browser} — {name} ({path})'
bw profiles --format jsonl prints one JSON object per line with browser, name, path fields
bw profiles --format csv prints header 'browser,name,path' then one row per profile
